title: cotoneaster tomentosus var. delphinensis
intro: Cotoneaster tomentosus var. delphinensis, also known as the Himalayan cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its berries, which contain anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Cotoneaster tomentosus var. delphinensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
